ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock (e.g., AMZN, MSFT) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company (e.g., Amazon, Microsoft) */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry to which the stock belongs */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation entry */,
  "stock_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first stock in the correlation pair */,
  "stock_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second stock in the correlation pair */,
  "correlation_coefficient" REAL /* Correlation coefficient between the two stocks (range: -1 to 1) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the correlation coefficient was calculated */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the correlation coefficient was calculated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the correlation data (e.g., internal calculation, external API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlations_stock_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id_1") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlations_stock_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id_2") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "preferred_stocks" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred stock tickers */,
  "preferred_industries" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred industries */,
  "preferred_sectors" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred sectors */,
  "preferred_sort_by" TEXT /* Preferred sorting criteria (e.g., correlation coefficient, company name) */,
  "preferred_filter_by" TEXT /* Preferred filtering criteria (e.g., industry, sector) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)
